summary: Website for Kare Detailing Garage — an auto detailing business website with black/red theme, Indian Rupee pricing (Basic Exterior Wash ₹599, Interior + Exterior ₹1499, Bike Wash ₹299), phone number +91 8527230903, email khushpal1011@gmail.com, no address, and working hours Monday–Sunday 8AM–4PM.

existing_features.title: Create a homepage with a full-width hero section featuring the business name 'Kare Detailing Garage', a tagline, and a prominent call-to-action button (e.g., 'Book Now' or 'Get a Quote') that scrolls to the contact section.
Create a Services section listing detailing packages with names, brief descriptions, and pricing. Include at least 3 tiers: Basic Wash, Full Detail, and Premium Detail package.
Create an About section that introduces Kare Detailing Garage, describing the business mission, values, and commitment to quality auto detailing.

Create a Contact / Booking section with a form that collects name, phone number, email, preferred service, and preferred date/time. On submission, store the inquiry in the backend and display a confirmation message to the user.
Create a sticky navigation bar with links to each section (Home, Services, About, Contact) and the business logo/name. The nav should be responsive with a hamburger menu on mobile.

Apply a bold, high-contrast visual theme across the entire website: dark charcoal/black backgrounds with bright amber/gold accent colors, strong sans-serif typography, and a clean, professional garage aesthetic. Use the generated hero background image as the hero section backdrop.
Create a footer with the business name 'Kare Detailing Garage', quick navigation links, and placeholder social media icons.
Render the generated static images (hero background and logo) from frontend/public/assets/generated as visual assets in the appropriate sections of the website.

Add a 'Doorstep Detailing' service option to the Services section. This should be presented as a distinct offering (card or highlighted banner) that clearly communicates mobile/on-location detailing — the team comes to the customer's home, office, or preferred location. Include a name, brief description emphasizing the convenience of doorstep service, and pricing or a 'Get a Quote' CTA that scrolls to the contact section.
Add 'Doorstep Detailing' as a selectable option in the 'Preferred Service' dropdown/select field within the Contact / Booking form in the Contact section.

Update the visual theme across the entire website to use a black and red color combination. Replace the existing amber/gold accent colors with bold red tones, keeping dark black/charcoal backgrounds. Apply this change consistently to all components: Navbar, Hero, Services, About, Contact, Footer, and any accent elements such as borders, buttons, highlights, and icons.

Update the Services section pricing to reflect Indian Rupee (₹) amounts: Basic Exterior Wash at ₹599, Interior + Exterior at ₹1499, and Bike Wash at ₹299. Replace any existing pricing labels on service cards with these new values. Ensure all currency symbols use the Indian Rupee symbol (₹), not dollars or other currencies.

Add the phone number +91 8527230903 to the Contact section's contact information area. Display it as a clickable tel: link. Remove any address or location fields/cards currently shown in the Contact section.
Display working hours in the Contact section as Monday to Sunday, 8:00 AM – 4:00 PM. This should replace any previously shown working hours or be added as a new working hours info card if none exist.

Add the Gmail address khushpal1011@gmail.com to the Contact section's contact information area. Display it as a clickable mailto: link alongside the existing phone number (+91 8527230903). Also ensure the mobile number +91 8527230903 is prominently displayed as a clickable tel: link in the contact info area (if not already present). Both pieces of contact info should be visible in the Contact section and in the Footer.

new_feature_requests.summary: Homepage with hero section and business branding for Kare Detailing Garage
Services menu showcasing detailing packages and pricing
Contact/booking section with form or call-to-action
Add a doorstep detailing service option — highlighting mobile/on-location detailing for customers
Change theme colors to black and red combination
Add pricing in Indian Rupees: Basic Exterior Wash ₹599, Interior + Exterior ₹1499, Bike Wash ₹299
Add phone number +91 8527230903, remove address, set working hours Monday–Sunday 8AM–4PM
Add Gmail khushpal1011@gmail.com and mobile number +91 8527230903 to the contact section
